title: teucrium heterophyllum subsp. heterophyllum
intro: Teucrium heterophyllum subsp. heterophyllum, also known as the Himalayan germander or Teucrium, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Teucrium heterophyllum subsp. heterophyllum has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress and improving cognitive function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal formulations to promote overall well-being.
